name: Lantern Warden
title: The Keeper of the Wet Quay

arena.summary: A dockside street of glare, puddles, bus stops, and shadow pockets.

phases.name: First Beacon
phases.summary: A bright harbor light tempts the player to stare and miss the edge.

phases.name: Wet Boardwalk
phases.summary: The road gets slick and the Warden dares a late stop.

phases.name: Shadow Channel
phases.summary: Pedestrian shadows and bus stops become the real threat.

phases.name: Harbor Stillness
phases.summary: The Warden loses force when the player scans calmly and keeps space.

intro: The quay is bright enough to blind the careless.
The wet stones will show you what you failed to read.
phaseShift: You looked at the light, not the lane.
You trusted shine where you should have trusted space.
defeat: The harbor keeps its lanterns for those who can see.
victory: The Warden sinks back into the reflection.

attackLines.summary: The Warden throws bright light across the lane.
A puddle shine looks like safe road until the wheels touch it.
A dark shape near the curb becomes a moving hazard.
